plan.failureSummary: The test failed in DETERMINISTIC mode because the autonomous agent attempted to use a cached selector for a 'Last Name' field which does not exist on the current page. The failure screenshot reveals the form is currently displaying 'Set 2' questions (e.g., 'Your Name', 'Contact Email'), while the cached tool call was specifically looking for 'Last Name *'.
observedIndicators: Visual mismatch: Tool parameters expected 'Last Name' but screenshot shows 'Your Name' (Set 2)
Historical pattern of alternating success/failure suggests dynamic/unstable UI sets

remediationSteps.details: Execute the test with the 'clearPageAiCache' directive. This will force the autonomous agent to re-examine the page rather than relying on the stale 'Set 1' selectors.

remediationSteps.summary: Evaluate deterministic mode suitability for dynamic form sets.
remediationSteps.details: If this test is intended to run deterministically against a fluctuating UI, the cache will continue to break. Consider if the test should run in a more adaptive mode or if the application can be pinned to a specific question set.

plan.notes: The alternating success/failure history suggests the application serves different form 'sets' (dynamic content). Clearing the cache will allow the agent to re-analyze the current form structure. Since the overall objective ('Fill out all survey questions') is semantically flexible, a fresh autonomous run is highly likely to succeed.
